issues.description: Condition missing: 'If you and your opponent have a total of 5 or less Life cards' is not represented. Should use a custom condition or compound condition checking total Life ≤ 5.
Second effect with trigger 'Trigger' and action 'PlaySelf' is unexplained by card text and appears to be erroneous template artifact.
Target scope 'ChooseOpponentCharacter' is correct but should clarify it targets up to 1 character (maxCount or similar constraint may be needed).

suggestedDsl.effectText: [On Play] If you and your opponent have a total of 5 or less Life cards, K.O. up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with 2000 power or less.
